hooks.command: cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" 2>/dev/null || exit 0; git rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; dirty=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null); ahead=$(git rev-list --count @{u}..HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$dirty" ]; then n=$(printf "%s\n" "$dirty" | grep -c .); printf '{"systemMessage": "📝 Có %s file thay đổi chưa commit — nhớ commit/push nếu xong việc."}' "$n"; elif [ -n "$ahead" ] && [ "$ahead" -gt 0 ]; then printf '{"systemMessage": "⬆️ Có %s commit chưa push lên origin — nhớ git push."}' "$ahead"; fi
